prestazioni: K24A2 engine swap with a custom-built 2.6L stroker kit using a K24A2 block, forged crankshaft (87.5mm stroke, Manley), forged pistons (JE 12.5:1 compression), and Eagle H-beam connecting rods, paired with a custom billet oil pump (Honda Performance Development) to handle increased oil flow demands at 9,000 RPM redline.

Full bolt-on forced induction system using a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe (Hybrid Racing), a PRL Motorsports intercooler piping kit (polished aluminum), and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller set to 22 psi on E85 fuel with a custom Hondata KPro V4 ECU tune (mapped by Church Automotive Testing).

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.785 final drive ratio), Driveshaft Shop 3.5-inch aluminum driveshaft, Clutch Masters FX500 twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel, and a custom 4-piston Brembo GT big brake kit (355mm rotors, Type-R calipers) with Hawk HT-14 brake pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (USDM-specific fender flares, carbon fiber front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom matte white vinyl wrap (3M 2080-G12) and black accents (vinyl by Vinyl Frog).

Custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon) with a functional vented scoop (AeroCatch hood pins) and a custom LED halo headlight conversion (Morimoto XB LED projectors with Diode Dynamics switchback turn signals).

Interior overhaul: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (red Alcantara with black stitching), NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, custom roll cage (10-point chromoly, welded by Autopower Industries), and a full digital dash conversion (Link ECU G4X with AIM MXS Strada display).
